decision_rationale: None of 8 results meet thresholds. Cossack composite mechanism has no precedent in the result set. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.74-0.88 / func 0.74-0.88 on Cocktail-MT + Post-Training-2026 + Multitask-LLM adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged (Pattern E).
